meta.title: Prompt Engineering, The Promptism and The Promtists (stable diffusion, GPT-3, Github Copilot)
meta.description:
In this video, the computer attempt to explain the basics of prompt engineering, a process by which one can create images with stable diffusion, text with GPT-3 and code with Github Copilot.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The tools used in this video:
Stable Diffusion:
https://stability.ai/blog/stable-diffusion-public-release
Open A.I. GPT-3 playground:
https://beta.openai.com/playground
Github Copilot:
https://github.com/features/copilot

watch how to create a movie with A.I.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=85Eg2N_YZ24


C O N T A C T:
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com

00:00 Intro
00:26 What is Prompt Engineering
00:57 Text to Code with Github Copilot
02:10 Text to Image with Stable Diffusion
04:05 The Promptism and The Promptists
04:37 The Monkeys in the latent space Band
05:09 Text generation with Open A.I. GPT-3
